summary: Iteration 8 testing complete - 48 Themes + 12 Animations System fully verified. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend features tested and working correctly.
passed_tests: --- ANIMATIONS SECTION (Feature 1-3) ---
Animations de fond section appears ABOVE themes grid

12 animation options displayed: Aucune, Lignes fluides, Fondu gradient, Particules, Vagues douces, Grille dynamique, Brume legere, Pulse lumineux, Diagonales, Cercles concentriques, Eclat glissant, Bokeh
Animation cards use data-testid='anim-{id}' attribute
Selected animation shows active border and checkmark
--- THEMES SECTION (Feature 4-6) ---
Palettes de couleurs section shows '48 themes' count
48 theme cards displayed in grid (data-testid='themes-grid')
Theme cards use data-testid='theme-{id}' attribute
Selected theme shows ring-2 border and 'Actif' badge
--- CATEGORY FILTERS (Feature 5) ---
9 category buttons present: Tous, Clair, Bleu, Vert, Chaud, Violet & Rose, Sombre, Terre, Special
Category buttons use data-testid='cat-{id}' attribute
Clicking 'Sombre' filter shows only 6 dark themes
Clicking 'Special' filter shows 6 special themes (including Volcan)
--- THEME SELECTION (Feature 7) ---
Selecting Volcan theme shows success toast
Toast displays combined label: 'Applique : Volcan + Bokeh'
--- ANIMATION SELECTION (Feature 8) ---
Selecting 'Lignes fluides' animation shows success toast
Toast displays combined label: 'Applique : Nuit Etoilee + Lignes fluides'
--- BACKEND API (Feature 9-10) ---
GET /api/settings returns selected_theme_id field
GET /api/settings returns selected_animation_id field
PUT /api/settings saves selected_theme_id correctly
PUT /api/settings saves selected_animation_id correctly
custom_css contains THEME: marker after theme selection
custom_css contains ANIM: marker after animation selection
Theme and animation persist after page reload
Partial updates work (updating animation doesn't clear theme)
--- DISPLAY PAGE (Feature 11) ---
Display page /display/386621 loads correctly
Animation overlay div present (data-testid='display-animation-overlay')
Overlay has correct styling: position=absolute, z-index=1, pointer-events=none, opacity=0.07
THEME: marker injected into page <style> tag
ANIM: marker injected into page <style> tag
Animation visually active (subtle lines visible)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo client account
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified the expanded 48-theme + 12-animation system. Key files: (1) frontend/src/pages/ThemesPage.js - Complete rewrite with animations section above themes, category filters, AnimationPreview and ThemeCard components. (2) frontend/src/lib/themes.js - 48 themes organized into 8 categories (light/blue/green/warm/purple/dark/earth/special), each theme has makeTheme function with colors and CSS. (3) frontend/src/lib/animations.js - 12 animations (none/lignes-fluides/fondu-gradient/particules/vagues/grille/brume/pulse/diagonales/cercles/eclat/bokeh), each with CSS targeting [data-testid='display-animation-overlay']. (4) frontend/src/pages/Display.js - Line 396 has animation overlay div. (5) backend/server.py - SettingsUpdate model has selected_theme_id and selected_animation_id optional string fields. Display code: 386621. Test selectors: data-testid='anim-{id}', data-testid='theme-{id}', data-testid='cat-{id}', data-testid='themes-grid', data-testid='animations-section-title', data-testid='themes-section-title', data-testid='display-animation-overlay'.
